faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Glendale, Queens?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Glendale typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the hive size, location accessibility, and complexity of the removal. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before starting any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Glendale?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Glendale. Most standard bee removals are completed within 2-4 hours, though larger or hard-to-reach colonies may require additional time. We prioritize urgent situations where bees pose immediate safety risks.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane relocation methods to preserve bee populations, which are vital pollinators. Our technicians assess each situation and work with local beekeepers to relocate healthy colonies. In cases where relocation isn't feasible due to aggressive species or structural damage, we use targeted extermination methods.
